arts.ttl: Paul Scholes aims subtle dig at Sir Jim Ratcliffe over Man Utd's £2bn stadium plan
arts.sum: Manchester United have unveiled plans for a glittering new stadium to replace Old Trafford and Red Devils icon Paul Scholes has broken his silence on the possible redevelopment

arts.ttl: Manchester United handed double penalty verdict after Real Sociedad decision
arts.sum: Manchester United needed to beat Real Sociedad in order to progress in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes urges Rasmus Hojlund to be 'more ruthless' as he insists struggling Man United striker 'isn't far away' but will never be 'a 25-30 goal a season guy'
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Paul Scholes thinks Rasmus Hojlund can turn things around despite being on a run of 20 matches without scoring a goal.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes spots Ruben Amorim's Manchester United summer transfer hint
arts.sum: Manchester United are expected to make several moves in the summer transfer window as they look to come back stronger next season

arts.ttl: Man Utd eye bargain replacement for ironman wanted by Real Madrid and Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Such an outcome could see Dalot consider ending his seven-year stint at Old Trafford, particularly with United already looking at replacements and the emerging interest from some of Europe’s top sides. United will look to sign a right wing-back as a priority this summer, with Sporting’s Geovany Quenda believed to be Amorim’s top target, although reports in Italy have linked the club to Genoa’s Koni de Winter in recent days.

arts.ttl: 'Talk is cheap' - Paul Scholes lands dig at the Glazers as new Man United stadium verdict given
arts.sum: Manchester United announced plans for a brand new stadium to replace Old Trafford this week as Sir Jim Ratcliffe addressed the media

arts.ttl: LIVE: Manchester United face Real Sociedad in the UEL round of 16
arts.sum: Manchester United host Real Sociedad at Old Trafford in the second leg of their round of 16 UEFA Europa League tie - ESPN has updates

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why Ayden Heaven has been given full Man United debut vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven has been handed a first start of his senior career in Manchester United's Europa League clash with Real Sociedad this evening.

arts.ttl: Who is Ayden Heaven? Man United teenager starts in Europa League vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Ayden Heaven has made a fast start to life at Man United after defecting from Arsenal

arts.ttl: How Man United can be one of seven Premier League teams that qualify for Champions League
arts.sum: There is a very real possibility that England could be represented in the Champions League next season by seven teams thanks to UEFA's rules
